title.en: Jinguang Supreme didn't say everything, but eve...

content.en:
There!

The Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others knew what the Golden Light Supreme was referring to, but their faces still changed many times.

"Impossible!" the Stone Dragon Supreme said, "How could a strong man in the chaos enter the universe, such a thing has never happened since so many universe epochs!

"What if it is precisely because of our help that the Chaos Arcana suppresses the origin of the universe......, can the strong in the chaos pay a certain price to enter the universe?

Jinguang Supreme didn't say everything, but everyone understood the meaning.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said, "Shall I ask the Lord for advice?"

"No, it's not good!" said the Golden Light Supreme, "That lord said that there is no important matter not to contact him, if it is just a suspicion, it will not arouse the anger of that lord." Besides, we still need to use the power of that adult to fight for a chance for us to get a chance to transcend, even if that adult has other plans, can we still turn against that adult?"

Many Supremes were silent.

Obviously, they didn't dare to turn their faces on that adult, at least not now.

"No matter what, if you find that master, Feng Min's death must not be counted like this. Also, let the children of the other eras be careful lest they fall outside. The Lord of the Yuan Gu reminded.

The other Supremes nodded one by one.

After the other Supremes left, a crazy killing intent appeared on the face of the Cold Spirit Supreme, and her killing intent was naturally not aimed at the other Supremes, but at the mysterious master.

"Dare to kill my disciple, no matter what your origin, once I find it, you will die!"

The Cold Spirit Supreme said coldly.

......

Another frontier.

Harmon looked at the starry sky and muttered, "It must have been some Cause and Effect Supreme who probed me just now." It's a pity that the way of cause and effect in this universe is too weak, and if the strong person of cause and effect in the chaos performs the art of cause and effect, I will definitely not be able to cut it. "

At the same time, he was also glad that he had found a secret realm that His Majesty had sent into this universe and obtained some amazing spells, otherwise it would be impossible for him to cut off the causal line of the Supreme of Cause and Effect with his current cultivation of dominating the limit.

"I have already attracted the attention of the supreme beings of this universe, and then I have to keep a low profile, hmph, when I step into the supreme realm of this universe, I will not be afraid of everything at that time! Once I am detached in this universe and return to chaos, I will be a transcendent, and my status will be far beyond before! This is a great opportunity given to me by His Holiness, and we must seize it!"

Harmon said darkly.

Suddenly.

He took out a compass and used his secret magic to sense it carefully.

As far as he knew, His Excellency had a great plan, and he arranged a lot of secret realms outside the universe, stored a lot of good things and opportunities, and when the universe expanded, those secret realms entered the universe with the expansion of the universe.

However, those secret realms are difficult to open, and they are extremely hidden, and even the Supreme is difficult to find.

If it weren't for the way His Excellency left them to find, he wouldn't have wanted to find a secret realm.

And this compass is a treasure that he got from the last secret realm, which can speed him up to the next secret realm.

Once he obtains multiple secret realms, his strength will progress faster.

In the outside world, he himself possessed a realm comparable to the supreme extreme of this universe, so if he had enough resources to support it, it would not be long before he regained his cultivation to the supreme extreme.

The only trouble was that he had to follow the cultivation path of this universe, otherwise he would not be able to transcend, so he would be delayed for a long time.

"Found it!"

Harmon said happily.

At this time, the compass pointed in a direction, and as long as you follow this direction, it will not be long before you can find the location of the secret realm.

Immediately, Harmon took a star shuttle to shuttle through the starry sky to the next secret realm.

It didn't take long for him to come to a territory.

"According to the intelligence, this is the territory of the Terrans, and the next secret realm is in the Terrans?"

Harmon thought to himself.

The Terran is not a powerful cosmic race, but there are many supremes, and if the supreme of the human race discovers his traces, it will be troublesome.

"Be careful!"

Harmon said darkly.

After entering the territory of the Terrans, he lowered his profile a lot, and even put away the star shuttle, carefully shuttling under the starry sky of the Terrans.

this day.

Harmon has arrived at one of the many star fields of the Terrans, the Disk Domain!

"It's not far away, it seems that that secret realm is in the pan domain! The pan is a star field where the human race is weaker, there are not even many cosmic gods, and there is no master in charge, the probability of me being discovered is close to 0!"

Harmon excitedly.

When he entered the circle, he relaxed a lot, and soon approached his destination.

Disk, Milky Way, Earth.

Earth is his destination.

As Harmon prepares to enter Earth, a formation emerges, sensing his presence.

"This ...... Formation !!"

Harmon was a little confused.

Such a small planet has such a powerful perception formation, and it can even sense his existence, this is definitely a formation arranged by a powerhouse above the Domination level!

"How so?"

Harmon wondered.

The first thought was that the secret realm was exposed, but if you think about it, it's absolutely impossible.

There are many human beings on the earth, and he grabbed a true god-level human at random, and his consciousness entered the soul of the other party to absorb the memories of the other party.

Soon, the origin of the planet became clear at a glance.

"The first day of the universe - Ye Tian, it turns out that this planet is his home planet, it seems that the formation on the earth was arranged by him, or he found someone to arrange it!"

Knowing the situation on Earth, Harmon breathed a sigh of relief.

Obviously, this secret place should not have been discovered.

As for Ye Tian, he was not afraid of offending, according to the intelligence, Ye Tian had only broken through to the Domination Realm for a short time.

For the genius of this universe, he doesn't pay attention to it at all, how is the son of the era, it is not at his hands that he has died.

"Ye Tian, if you dare to come, then kill you!"

Harmon muttered.

Of course, once he killed Ye Tian, he had to leave here immediately, otherwise he would attract the supreme of the human race.

Therefore, he must take the contents of this secret realm away as soon as possible.

Shout!

Harmon went deep into the earth and came to the Kunlun Mountains, and saw the space in the depths of the Kunlun Mountains, which was also the underground space where Ye Tian discovered the World Tree in the first place.

However, this underground space is not so simple, it is the entrance to a secret realm, but Ye Tian's strength was too weak at the beginning, and he couldn't discover the secret of this space at all.

"This is it, it should be open in a few days. If Ye Tian comes, catch him with one move, and then destroy him after taking the treasure!"

Harmon planned.
